summary: Comprehensive testing of SourceSelector per item row feature. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All 12 frontend features tested and working correctly. The fix for Request Stock selector persistence flow is verified - SourceSelector now appears per item row with proper segment/bucket fallback behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: RequestStockForm.jsx correctly implements SourceSelector per item row with sourceSelector state per row
SourceSelector.jsx correctly handles 403 UNAUTHORIZED fallback to bucket mode with warning message
DirectDispatchForm.jsx correctly uses SourceSelector per item row (regression check passed)
Submit button correctly disabled until sourceSelector is selected for all item rows

success_rate.backend: 100% (15/15 pytest tests passed - 10 request flow + 5 source selector)

seed_data_creation: None - using real POS API via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: SourceSelector per item row feature fully tested. Key behaviors verified: (1) SourceSelector appears after item selection in both Request Stock and Direct Dispatch forms, (2) Franchise user sees bucket fallback with warning when source-options returns 403, (3) Central user sees segment picker for own store, (4) Submit button disabled until sourceSelector selected, (5) Request submission with bucket selector succeeds.

backend_api_tests.source_options_returns_segments_for_own_: PASS - Central user gets segments for own store
backend_api_tests.source_options_returns_403_for_cross_sto: PASS - Franchise user gets 403 for parent store
backend_api_tests.request_with_bucket_selector_succeeds: PASS - Request with filter_bucket selector creates transfer
backend_api_tests.dispatch_with_bucket_selector_succeeds: PASS - Dispatch with bucket selector creates transfer

frontend_ui_tests.1_central_login_works: PASS - owner@democentral2.com logs in, shows DemoCentral2 Master Store
frontend_ui_tests.2_request_stock_form_loads: PASS - Form loads at /request/new with source picker
frontend_ui_tests.3_source_picker_shows_sources: PASS - Shows My Genie (Direct Parent) as default
frontend_ui_tests.4_catalog_items_load: PASS - 4 items: Cooking Oil, maida, patri, red meat
frontend_ui_tests.5_source_selector_appears_after_item_sel: PASS - SourceSelector component appears per item row
frontend_ui_tests.6_bucket_fallback_with_warning: PASS - Shows 'Segment selection unavailable for cross-store requests' warning
frontend_ui_tests.7_bucket_options_available: PASS - 4 bucket options: Without Batch & Expiry, With Batch & Expiry, etc.
frontend_ui_tests.8_submit_enabled_after_selector_chosen: PASS - Submit button enabled after bucket selected
frontend_ui_tests.9_franchise_login_works: PASS - owner@demofranchise4.com logs in, shows DemoFranchise4 Outlet
frontend_ui_tests.10_franchise_sees_3_sources: PASS - DemoCentral2 (Direct Parent), My Genie (Upstream Central), DemoCentral1 (Sibling)
frontend_ui_tests.11_direct_dispatch_form_works: PASS - Form loads with SourceSelector per item row
frontend_ui_tests.12_dispatch_segment_mode_works: PASS - Segment mode shows 'Seg #35 — 1 avail' for own store

api_contracts_verified.POST /api/proxy/v2/inventory-transfer/so: Returns segments[] and filters{} for own store, 403 for cross-store
api_contracts_verified.POST /api/proxy/v2/inventory-transfer/re: Accepts source_selector with mode=filter_bucket or mode=segment_id

key_fix_verified.issue: Frontend was hardcoding filter_bucket/without_batch_and_expiry selector for all request submissions
key_fix_verified.fix: SourceSelector component now appears per item row, requiring explicit segment_id or filter_bucket selection
key_fix_verified.verification: Tested both segment mode (for own store) and bucket fallback mode (for cross-store requests)
